headline_seed: 🇦🇹 Austrian police have found rat poison in a baby food jar in a probe that has seen the company HiPP recall the line over suspected tampering, with the firm stating on Sunday its production process was not to blame ➡️
draft_text:
#BreakingMews Rat poison confirmed in HiPP baby food jars sold at SPAR Austria's 1,500 stores. BBC News and AFP report a full recall is underway. HiPP calls it criminal interference. Consuming affected jars could be life-threatening.

And that's the mews.
